visual_description: A close-up, high-angle shot shows a man lying on his back on a textured, gray-green floor. He has dark, disheveled hair and a small, bloody cut on his forehead. He wears a light blue collared shirt and a gold chain around his neck. His eyes are open, looking upward with a dazed or pained expression. The lighting is dim and cool-toned. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is dominated by a loud, jarring, and distorted sound effect, like a violent, metallic crash or a powerful, echoing bang, creating a sense of sudden and intense violence. The scene cuts to an extreme close-up of a woman with long, dark, curly hair. She is wearing a light-colored, possibly white, top. The shot is shaky and chaotic, focusing on her face as she appears to be in distress or pain, with her head moving erratically. The background is dark and indistinct. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
